top.name: Avatar of Elements
top.rules_text: Transform for 3 turns: gain 7 armor, spells deal +3 damage and imbue target with random element. Leave elemental trails when moving.

bottom.name: Maelstrom
bottom.rules_text: Create a storm zone (radius 3). Each turn deals 5 damage, pushes clockwise, imbues with Storm. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Avatar lasts longer and grants more armor. Maelstrom deals more damage.

changes.value: Transform for 4 turns: gain 9 armor, spells deal +3 damage and imbue with random element.
Create storm zone (radius 3). Each turn: 7 damage, push clockwise, imbue Storm. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Elemental Sovereign: While transformed, gain attunement stacks each time you imbue.

changes.value: Transform 4 turns: 9 armor, +3 damage, imbue on cast. Gain attunement stacks when you imbue during transform.

upgrades.description: Storm Veil: Maelstrom also grants shield to the caster each turn it deals damage.

changes.value: Create storm zone (radius 3). Each turn: 7 damage, push, imbue. Gain 4 shield per turn. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Transcendence: The transform bonus damage grows to +5 and all elements are imbued.

changes.value: Transform 4 turns: 9 armor, +5 damage on all spells. Each cast imbues random element. Attunement on imbue.

upgrades.description: Eye of the Maelstrom: The storm zone also freezes enemies pushed into its walls.

changes.value: Create storm zone (radius 3). Each turn: 8 damage, push, imbue Storm, freeze pushed enemies. Gain 4 shield. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: God of Elements: Complete mastery — the transform is a total elemental ascension.

changes.value: Transform 5 turns: 12 armor, +6 damage, +1 speed. Each cast imbues and grants attunement. Elemental trails on movement.

upgrades.description: World Storm: The maelstrom grows to radius 5 and persists for 5 turns.

changes.value: Create massive storm zone (radius 5). Each turn: 9 damage, push, imbue, freeze. Gain 5 shield/turn. Lasts 5 turns.
